ab: ’inavayan, tratrima’ u za eman?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: tratrima’ ku za kuppu saya.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: ’inavayan, tratrima’ u za eman?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: tratrima’ ku za saya a talupung.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: tratrima’ ku za kuppu, menaniwan mu nay?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: ulra, tratrima’ u za papidaya?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: menaniwan mu za puran?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: ’azi, ’azi mi menaniwan za puran.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: tratrima’ ku za veras.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: tratrima’ u za pidaya travu?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: tratrima’ ku za telu travu.
en: A:I want to buy three packs.

ab: tratrima’ ku za vurasi.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: mupiya lra kiniwan na vurasi.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: tratrima’ ku za zuwa dalilran na lrawlraw.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: niniyam lrawlraw musama’ lra za sadalilran.
en: B: We only have one bottle of oil left.

ab: uwa trima’anay ku za vetrinun.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: tratrima’ u za pidaya tingting?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: tratrima’ u za pidaya tingting na vetrinun?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: tratrima’ ku za zuwaya tingting.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: tratrima’ ku za zuwa vetu’ za kenaw.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: musama’ za telu vetu’ zi, trima’i peniya!
en: B: The remaining three, buy them all!

ab: ini na satravu na veras mu pidaya paisu?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: na satravu mu zuwa leman paisu.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: ta pukasayaw mu makavetra’an misama’ za saya paisu, makavetra’an paisu maruwa.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: lrayuwan.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: kani mu makaiwa misama’ za lruwatra paisu.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: tremima’a ku ziya trmulrtrulr palru saleman paisu.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: peniya mu lruwatra leman misama’ za muketrep paisu.
en: A: All $510.

ab: aruwa u lalehet kanizu na muketrep paisu zi lruwatr leman lra naku vaveray kaninu mu?
ch: B:你可以少算10元而我就付500元給你好嗎?
en: B: Can you take $10 off and I'll give you $500?

ab: pazangal zazu inia , karuwa u kemadulu pakiwalay?
ch: A:這個太貴了，你可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: This is too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: ’azi , inia mu maw na dinulu lra.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: tratrima’ ku kanini na satravu na walru.
en: A: I want to buy this packet of candy.

ab: ini na walru mu makatelun paisu, maranger u ziya tremima’ za zuma za eman?
ch: B:這糖30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for this candy, anything else you need?
